rationale: The citing paper’s stated theory contribution is the online-community “cushion” mechanism (perceived support and tie strength), while the cited paper focuses on a different mechanism (gender × issue capability via agency-communion) in Jeopardy/investment/insurance tasks. In the provided notes, the cited work is not indicated as a core theory, method, or benchmark source for the citing studies, and the evidence is only a single DOI-matched reference entry without contextual quotation. This looks most like a domain-adjacent background citation rather than substantive use.
